data.title: [UPDATE] test_ticket_reducer.py: add test for compute_dir_hash() marker-presence sensitivity
data.description: Add tests to tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer.py verifying that compute_dir_hash() returns different hashes when .archived marker is present vs. absent for the same set of event files. Tests: (1) test_cache_hash_differs_with_marker_present — same events, hash changes after write_marker(); (2) test_cache_hash_stable_when_no_marker_change — hash unchanged when events unchanged and no marker change; (3) test_cache_hash_differs_after_marker_removal — hash changes again after remove_marker(). testing_mode: UPDATE. Covers SC5.
